headline: Assessing AES (AES) Valuation After Mixed Short Term Returns And Contrasting Fair Value Views
summary: AES (AES) is back in focus after recent trading highlighted its mixed return profile, with a 1 day decline, modest gains over the past week and month, and stronger performance over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for AES. At the current share price of $14.47, AES shows a mixed picture, with a 5.08% 3 month share price return and a 56.10% 1 year total shareholder return, in contrast with weaker multi year total returns. If you are comparing AES with other utilities tied to grid...

headline: Oracle Taps Hilary Maxson As CFO To Steer AI Infrastructure Push
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has appointed Hilary Maxson as its new Chief Financial Officer. Maxson brings experience in infrastructure investment and business transformation from roles at Schneider Electric and AES Corporation. The CFO change comes as Oracle is investing heavily in AI infrastructure and reshaping its business model. Oracle sells enterprise software and cloud services and is currently focused on building out AI infrastructure for customers. That requires large, ongoing capital...
